categories.name: Abuse Detection & Moderation
categories.description: Detect, label, quarantine, or respond to spam, harassment, and low-quality automated contributions.

categories.name: Contributor Trust & Admission
categories.description: Use explicit vouches or contribution history to control access without closing a project to everyone.

categories.name: Intake & Triage
categories.description: Reduce review load with structured intake, labels, lifecycle automation, and emergency lockdowns.

categories.name: Workflow & Supply-Chain Defense
categories.description: Protect CI, dependencies, secrets, and merge paths from hostile or compromised contributions.

categories.name: Policies & Playbooks
categories.description: Set expectations before problems arrive and respond consistently when they do.

resources.name: Niubi Guard
resources.description: Repository abuse detection and response system for spam, harassment, and coordinated attacks.

resources.name: Anti Slop
resources.description: Configurable GitHub Action that detects and can close low-quality or AI-slop pull requests.

resources.name: GitHub AI Moderator
resources.description: AI-powered Action from GitHub that detects and labels spam in repository conversations.

resources.name: AI Community Moderator
resources.description: Moderates community interactions against a project's contributing guide and code of conduct.

resources.name: AI Assessment Comment Labeler
resources.description: Issue-intake Action that retrieves an AI assessment and applies configurable labels.

resources.name: Fossier
resources.description: Vouch-compatible workflow and CLI for reducing unsolicited pull-request spam.

resources.name: Vouch
resources.description: Community trust management based on explicit vouches before a participant can contribute.

resources.name: Good Egg
resources.description: Scores pull-request authors using their contribution history across GitHub.

resources.name: Labeler
resources.description: Official Action for labeling pull requests from changed files and branch patterns.

resources.name: Stale
resources.description: Official Action for marking and optionally closing inactive issues and pull requests.

resources.name: Lock Threads
resources.description: Locks closed issues, pull requests, and discussions after a configurable period.

resources.name: Repo Lockdown
resources.description: Emergency Action that immediately closes and locks new issues or pull requests.

resources.name: Harden-Runner
resources.description: Monitors network egress, file integrity, and processes on GitHub-hosted runners.

resources.name: OpenSSF Scorecard
resources.description: Automated security-health checks for open-source projects and their dependencies.

resources.name: zizmor
resources.description: Static analysis for security and correctness problems in GitHub Actions workflows.

resources.name: pinact
resources.description: Pins GitHub Actions and reusable workflows to immutable commit hashes.

resources.name: Dependency Review Action
resources.description: Blocks pull requests that introduce vulnerable dependencies or disallowed licenses.

resources.name: TruffleHog
resources.description: Finds and verifies leaked credentials before they become a maintainer incident.

resources.name: PRevent
resources.description: Detects suspicious pull-request changes that may indicate malicious code.

resources.name: Open Source AI Contribution Policies
resources.description: Comparative catalog of how open-source projects govern AI-generated contributions.

resources.name: Agentic OSS Policy
resources.description: Policy templates for protecting projects from autonomous agent abuse.

resources.name: OpenSSF AI-Slop Best Practices
resources.description: Open working-group effort to develop current practices for low-quality AI security reports and contributions.
